name: career-positioning-os
description: Career Positioning OS packages public-safe skills and schemas for turning private work evidence into career signal.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for turning work evidence into career signal
interface.longDescription: Public-safe skills, schemas, validators, and examples for converting private work evidence into resume, LinkedIn, portfolio, interview, recruiter, profile, article, post, and visual brand artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Turn this achievement into a confidentiality-safe long-form article draft.
Draft and validate a LinkedIn About section from sanitized achievement evidence.
Review this career evidence for public/private boundary risks.
Structure this project story as reusable career evidence.
